prompt: 18th-century maritime navigation chart illustrating reinforcement learning as a wooden exploration ship navigating between islands representing states. Treasure chests mark rewards and optimal policies. Dotted sea routes show exploration vs exploitation paths. Hand-inked compass roses, rhumb lines, cartographic sea creatures, and coastline hatch shading represent iterative learning updates. Aged parchment texture background. Annotated in explorer’s copperplate handwriting labeling states, rewards, policy, and routes. Muted watercolor washes in sepia, indigo, and ochre. No modern typography, no digital gradients, no photorealistic lighting, no contemporary symbols.
concept: Reinforcement Learning (state-space exploration and reward-based policy optimization)
tradition_approach: Used compass roses, rhumb lines, parchment textures, copperplate annotations, watercolor coastlines, and symbolic navigation routes to mirror exploration dynamics in reinforcement learning and visually map policy discovery as maritime route optimization.
